content.en:
In the following days, Ye Tian searched for various resources and treasures, copied the Holy Fu, and killed the Holy Soul Beast to absorb the power of the Holy Soul to strengthen his own Soul Holy Light.

I have to say that Ye Tian's strength is very strong, so he naturally has a lot of gains.

In addition, there were too many Holy Soul Beasts in the Holy Soul Realm, and there were naturally many Holy Endowments, which were completely beyond his imagination.

In the blink of an eye, 10,000 years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian didn't know how many holy endowments he had copied, and the copy talent panel presented dense holy endowments, and they were all fused one by one.

On this day, Ye Tian was ready to fuse a class of holy endowments to see if he could cause the transformation of the holy endowments.

"Let's just fuse the power class holy endowment!"

Ye Tian decided.

Because power-type holy endowments are relatively common, many of the holy soul beasts are power-type holy endowments.

The time to fuse the holy gift is relatively long, in order not to delay time, Ye Tian took out a holy relic containing the rules of time, and urged this holy relic with all his might, blessed with countless energy treasures, and opened the time acceleration of tens of millions of years to one.

Of course, in this case, it would be difficult for him to cultivate, but he would not practice either, just to accelerate the fusion of the Holy Endowment.

Two Sacred Gifts Combined!

Three Divine Gifts Fusion!

The Four Sacred Gifts are fused!

......

Ten kinds!

Hundreds!

Thousand!

Even if the ancestors have a great opportunity, they can't give birth to so many holy gifts, and the ancestors don't look down on the holy gifts, so they naturally don't bother to study how to give birth to the holy gifts.

Only a demon like Ye Tian, who has the talent of copying, has such a holy endowment, and he can also fuse the holy endowment together.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had already fused a billion years in the time acceleration environment, and a hundred years had passed in the outside world.

At this time, Ye Tian had already fused more than 100,000 power-type holy endowments, but he still did not make a qualitative change in the holy endowments.

However, he felt that the new Unknown Power Class Divine Endowment had reached a very powerful level, far beyond the ordinary Divine Endowment, and was about to undergo a qualitative change.

"Continue to merge!"

After fusing more than a dozen power-type saints, the unknown power-type saints finally completed the qualitative change.

Rumble!!!!!

In the depths of his soul, Ye Tian's unknown Divine Endowment formed by fusing more than 100,000 power-type Divine Endowments was transforming, and the talent imprint was constantly expanding, gradually turning into one word - force!

The imprint of talent takes the form of a word, and no one believes it when it is spoken, but it happens.

At the same time, Ye Tian sensed the situation of this Sect Power Holy Endowment.

【Ancestral Endowment: Strength】

"There really is an ancestral endowment, maybe this is the only ancestral endowment in the Dark Sacred Domain!"

Ye Tian imagined.

Of course, this is not certain, the ancestors may have more secrets, and maybe they can also study the ancestral endowment.

I have to say that after having the ancestral endowment, Ye Tian found that the power of the ancestral endowment alone was comparable to the holy skills of the extreme realm.

"If I continue to cultivate a power-type holy technique, is it possible to break the shackles and become an ancestral skill?"

Ye Tian guessed.

If he could really do it, his strength would reach terrifying levels.

Next, Ye Tian continued to fuse other holy endowments.

He copied a lot of each type of holy endowment, for example, some holy soul beast races, although he didn't dare to provoke, but he could copy a large number of holy endowments at one time, so he didn't lack holy endowments at all.

Soon, a sect ancestor was born.

【Zufu: Speed】

【Ancestral Fu: Defense】

【Ancestral Fu: Gold】

【Ancestral Fu: Fire】

......

Ye Tian has a lot of ancestors, but the only pity is that he can't form the space ancestor and the time ancestor, because there are relatively few holy soul beasts with space and time saints, he has been looking for so long for so long, and he has only encountered dozens of time saint soul beasts and more than a hundred space saint soul beasts.

Such a little endowment cannot cause qualitative change at all.

Therefore, if he wants to give birth to the Space Ancestor and the Time Ancestor, he can only accumulate it slowly.

After giving birth to so many ancestral endowments, Ye Tian re-cultivated those holy techniques, among which he specialized in two holy techniques, one was the Holy Armor Holy Technique and the other was the Golden Silk Holy Technique.

These two holy techniques are not very difficult to cultivate, so it is easier to break the shackles and become ancestral skills.

Hundreds of thousands of years have passed, and Ye Tian's soul holy light has reached fifty percent, which is equivalent to half of the souls have become soul holy light, so Ye Tian's strength has increased a lot again, reaching the peak realm of the six-step invincible domain ancestor, which is very close to the five-step invincible domain ancestor.

If he was able to condense the Holy Soul, he would definitely be able to reach the five-step invincible domain ancestor combat power.

Or, if he cultivated a holy technique to the level of the ancestral technique, even if it was only an introduction to the ancestral technique, he would definitely be able to possess a five-step invincible domain ancestral combat power.

this day.

Ye Tian took an invincible domain ancestor-level holy soul beast to cultivate his golden silk holy technique, and he didn't kill this holy soul beast that only had an eight-step invincible domain ancestor, he only fought with it.

Puff puff!!!

One after another, the golden threads cut this holy soul beast, and this holy soul beast also continued to attack Ye Tian, one person and one beast had contacts and dealings.

At the same time, Ye Tian has also been opening the Golden Ancestral Fu, and he has felt the power of the Ancestral Fu and the Golden Silk Holy Technique.

I don't know when, Ye Tian seemed to have fallen into an epiphany, and his consciousness extended to the root of the holy technique.

At this time, he saw golden rivers.

"Gold, Edge, Ancestor, Origin, Unity......"

Suddenly, Ye Tian seemed to have comprehended the root of gold, and finally understood a trace of the mystery of Jin's ancestor.

I have to say that the Golden Ancestor Fu is not only a talent, but also a kind of guidance, guiding Ye Tian to comprehend a deeper realm, second only to the effect of the Golden Ancestor Method.

In terms of comprehending the Holy Technique and Ancestral Technique, the Golden Ancestor Fu can far surpass the so-called Ancestor Method.

Rumble!!!!!

The Golden Silk Holy Technique has transformed, and it is no longer a Holy Skill.

Today's Golden Silk Sacred Technique can be called the Golden Silk Ancestral Technique!

"Golden Silk Ancestral Technique, kill!"

A wisp of golden light instantly slashed through the void, instantly slashing the invincible Domain Ancestor Holy Soul Beast in front of him into two.

"It is worthy of the Golden Silk Ancestral Technique, and the attack power is very terrifying!"

Ye Tian was very satisfied.

As long as he continues to cultivate the Golden Silk Ancestral Technique, cultivate the Golden Silk Ancestral Technique to the Xiaocheng realm, or obtain some more ancestral skills, his strength is afraid that he can reach the extreme of the five-step Invincible Domain Ancestor, second only to the combat power of the four-step Invincible Domain Ancestor.

At that time, he was afraid that he would be able to sweep through the Holy Soul Realm.
